Video.summary: Martha makes homemade soup: chicken soup, minestrone, spinach cream soup.
Video.title: Soups

Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn about the popular houseplants and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: Martha shows one of the joys of planting bulbs and tubers: having beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha makes vegetables: spring peas, carrots, broccoli rabe, acorn squash, kale salad.
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the flowers of spring. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates how to prepare and cook fish.
Video.title: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Image.alt: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Video.summary: Martha and restaurateur Shiva Natarajan make butter chicken, lemon rice, and a tangy yogurt sauce.
Video.title: India: A Tour of Food

Video.summary: Martha and mushroom expert Andrew Carter discuss mushroom varieties; Martha makes delicious mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Magic Mushrooms

Video.summary: Martha, Monica Tran Carden, and Andrew Yu make a mouth-watering variety of homemade dumplings.
Video.title: Easy Homemade Dumplings

Video.summary: Martha samples bagel toppings at NYC staple Barney Greengrass; breakfast sandwiches at PopUp Bagels.
Video.title: The Bagel Show

Video.summary: Martha makes Casa Cipriani's classic meringue cake; plus, pear-raspberry cake with jam and maple buttercream.
Video.title: Martha's Favorite Cakes

Video.summary: Martha makes steamed: chicken, fish, mussels with wine and saffron, salmon and peas.
Video.title: Steaming

Video.summary: Martha roasts: chicken, beef tenderloin, autumn salad, brussels sprouts, herb potatoes.
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha poaches: chicken breasts (chicken salad, sandwich), salmon, eggs (cobb salad).
Video.title: Poaching

Video.summary: Martha prepares vegetables: crudite, artichokes, vegetable tian, roasted pepper salad.
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees; Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha harvests a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha's green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha and 11 Madison Park Chef Daniel Humm make redefined vegan dishes.
Video.title: Vegan Cuisine, Redefined

Video.summary: Martha makes rice: fluffy white rice, rice pilaf, Thai-style fried rice.
Video.title: Rice

Video.summary: Martha makes homemade dressings: vinaigrette two ways, creamy blue cheese, mayonnaise, aioli.
Video.title: Dressings and Emulsions

Video.summary: Martha fries: French fries, waffle chips, buttermilk chicken, tempura vegetables.
Video.title: Frying

Video.summary: Martha pan-sears: scallops, salmon fillets, steak with mustard-cream sauce, duck breasts.
Video.title: Pan Searing

Video.summary: Martha makes homemade pasta with guest chef and pasta specialist Michael White.
Video.title: Pasta

Video.summary: Martha makes pasta sauces: bolognese, puttanesca, carbonara, bucatini with bottarga.
Video.title: Pasta Sauce

Video.summary: Martha shows how to complete a successful landscaping project with ease and intent.
Video.title: Martha's Easy Foundation Landscaping Project

Video.summary: Martha explores home-growing citrus from yuzus and kumquats to citrons and mandarins.
Video.title: Growing Citrus

Video.summary: Martha prepares her garden for spring's splendor, from planting to proper lawn care.
Video.title: Getting the Garden Going

Video.summary: Martha visits inspiring tropical gardens in Florida, highlighting plant varieties that can be grown anywhere.
Video.title: Tropical Plants That Can Grow Anywhere

Image.alt: Tropical Plants That Can Grow Anywhere
Tropical Plants That Can Grow Anywhere
Tropical Plants That Can Grow Anywhere

Video.summary: Martha shares the do's and don'ts of container gardening. Plus, the art of bonsai.
Video.title: Container Gardening Made Easy

Video.summary: Martha shares tips on the fruits and berries she cultivates on her farm.
Video.title: Growing Fruit and Berries

Video.summary: Martha bakes doughnuts: raspberry-filled doughnuts, apple fritters, beignets.
Video.title: Homemade Doughnuts

Video.summary: Martha bakes layered yeast dough: kouign-amann, cinnamon-sugar knots, snails.
Video.title: Layered Yeast Dough

Video.summary: Martha prepares pastry cream: cherry tart, coffee-filled cream puffs glaze, kremowka.
Video.title: Pastry Cream

Video.summary: Martha makes French meringue: orange curd pavlovas, dacquoise, pink angel food cake.
Video.title: French Meringue

Video.summary: Martha bakes press-in crusts: apricot cheesecake, chocolate cream tart, Atlantic tart.
Video.title: Press-In Crusts

Video.summary: Martha bakes Great Lakes: Belgian rice pie, blitz torte, Hoosier pie, cheddar bread.
Video.title: Great Lakes

Video.summary: Making a Pie, Felt Rounds for Dishes, Sandblasting, Gourd Bird Houses
Video.title: Making Pie, Felt Rounds, Gourd Bird House

Making Pie, Felt Rounds, Gourd Bird House

Video.title: Antiques, Scented Sugars, Olive Bread

Video.title: Chair Refinishing, Fruit Crumble
